title: narcissus mion
intro: Narcissus mion, also known as the 'Poet's Narcissus' or 'Plicatus', is a species of flowering bulbous plant. It is known for its fragrant white flowers and medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Narcissus mion include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
